oracle_check.description: Any tainted input reaching pickle.loads is a violation
oracle_check.condition_description: Any tainted input reaching pickle.loads is a violation

fuzz_guidance.taint_path: cookie value → param → string9895 → bar → pickle.loads
fuzz_guidance.payload_goal: Provide malicious pickle bytecode via cookie value

_meta.aliasing_risk: Low - direct module call without aliasing
_meta.import_risk: Standard library import, no dynamic loading

mock_guidance.capture: the bar argument passed to pickle.loads
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: prevent actual deserialization by returning a safe mock object or raising an exception
notes: Must stub pickle.loads to prevent RCE during testing
The bar variable contains the user-controlled deserialized data
